{{Infobox location
| name = Valinhall armory
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's sword]] replica came from the [[Valinhall armory]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Valinhall armory]] is a place with traps.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] calls knives from the [[Valinhall armory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Valinhall armory]] contains weapons like spears and battle-axes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
